faqs.a: Yes, all our trainers are certified by the British Boxing Board of Control (BBBofC).
Absolutely. We offer a variety of boxing gear and equipment for rent.

faqs.q: Can I join if I'm new to boxing?
faqs.a: Yes, we welcome beginners and offer classes suitable for all skill levels.

faqs.q: How do I sign up for a class?
faqs.a: You can register online or visit our gym in person to get started.
